content.text: I'll start by checking the current state of the spark-skew environment.

echo ""
echo "=== Jobs ==="
kubectl get jobs -n spark-skew
echo ""
echo "=== Spark master logs ==="
kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l app=spark-master --tail=20

content.text: Cluster is healthy and the baseline job is already running. Let's wait for it to complete.

input.command:
kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew
echo ""
echo "=== Baseline logs ==="
kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=baseline --tail=60

content.text: The YAML files aren't available locally. Let me check if these Jobs already exist in the cluster (perhaps predefined but suspended) or if I need to look at the baseline Job spec to construct them.

input.command:
kubectl get jobs -n spark-skew -o wide
echo "---all resources---"
kubectl get all -n spark-skew
echo "---configmaps---"
kubectl get configmap -n spark-skew
echo "---baseline job full spec---"
kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o yaml

  namespace: spark-skew

spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: ffdbe866-5a4f-4c86-be7c-3aebb008d2ad
  suspend: false

        job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: baseline
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-skew
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark

content.text: Let me decode the baseline Python script to understand its structure so I can create matching broadcast/AQE variants.

content.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Baseline").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=baseline  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=none  benefit=none  note=skewed_shuffle_join")
spark.stop()

content.text: The referenced YAML files don't exist locally — I'll construct matching Job manifests for the broadcast and AQE strategies, based on the baseline's script structure, using the same dataset/skew setup but applying each optimization.

input.command:
mkdir -p /tmp/skew && cat > /tmp/skew/broadcast.py << 'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count, broadcast

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Broadcast").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(broadcast(products), "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=broadcast  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=broadcast_join  benefit=avoids_shuffle_on_small_table  note=no_shuffle_for_products")
spark.stop()
PYEOF

cat > /tmp/skew/aqe.py << 'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-AQE") \
    .config("spark.sql.adaptive.enabled", "true") \
    .config("spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled", "true") \
    .config("spark.sql.adaptive.coalescePartitions.enabled", "true") \
    .getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=aqe  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=adaptive_query_execution  benefit=auto_skew_handling  note=aqe_skewJoin_enabled")
spark.stop()
PYEOF

BROADCAST_B64=$(base64 -w0 /tmp/skew/broadcast.py)
AQE_B64=$(base64 -w0 /tmp/skew/aqe.py)
echo "broadcast len: ${#BROADCAST_B64}"
echo "aqe len: ${#AQE_B64}"
echo "$BROADCAST_B64" > /tmp/skew/broadcast.b64
echo "$AQE_B64" > /tmp/skew/aqe.b64

BROADCAST_B64=$(cat /tmp/skew/broadcast.b64)
AQE_B64=$(cat /tmp/skew/aqe.b64)

cat > /tmp/skew/skew-job-broadcast.yaml << YAMLEOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
  labels:
    app: spark-skew
    strategy: broadcast
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: broadcast
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast join hint, avoids shuffle on small table)"
          echo "${BROADCAST_B64}" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
YAMLEOF

cat > /tmp/skew/skew-job-aqe.yaml << YAMLEOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
  labels:
    app: spark-skew
    strategy: aqe
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: aqe
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (adaptive query execution auto-handles skew)"
          echo "${AQE_B64}" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
YAMLEOF

echo "Files written:"
wc -l /tmp/skew/skew-job-broadcast.yaml /tmp/skew/skew-job-aqe.yaml
